content: UX patterns reducing input friction for Gen Z mobile finance: (1) biometric auth from day 1; (2) progressive disclosure onboarding — show value before asking for data; (3) tap/swipe interactions over form fills; (4) OCR auto-fill from receipts; (5) smart category defaults that learn; (6) quick-add transaction from home screen (2-3 taps max); (7) voice-note or photo as primary input, manual form as fallback; (8) bold visual design, not sterile banking blues — approachable aesthetics reduce intimidation. Number of fields per transaction form is the single strongest predictor of completion rate.
